title: Flaming Frontiers
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Wyndham Gittens, George H. Plympton
actors: Johnny Mack Brown, Eleanor Hansen, John Archer
plot: Tom Grant has found a rich gold vein and Bart Eaton is after it. Tom's sister Mary heads for the gold fields and Eaton and his men follow. Eaton teams up with Ace Daggett who plans to doublecross him and get the gold for himself. ...
